sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_md5 (input_string VARCHAR, md5_value BIGINT);
INSERT INTO test_md5 (input_string, md5_value) VALUES ('sample_text', md5_number_higher('sample_text'));
UPDATE test_md5 SET md5_value = md5_number_higher(input_string) WHERE input_string = 'example';
SELECT input_string, md5_value FROM test_md5 WHERE md5_value > 0;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_md5 WHERE md5_value = md5_number_higher('string_with_md5');
